title: Rajaputhiran
overview: Chellaiyah, a 60-year-old farmer, sees agriculture as a sacred calling and opposes his son Pattamuthu working for others. But when unforeseen circumstances push Pattamuthu to secretly take a job under a man named Linga, he soon finds himself trapped in illegal money dealings. As Pattamuthu struggles, Chellaiyah steps in to save his son and bring him back to his roots.
